mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, name) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name})

INSERT INTO refresh_token (member_id, token, expires_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{refreshToken}, NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days') ON CONFLICT (member_id) DO UPDATE SET token = EXCLUDED.token, expires_at = EXCLUDED.expires_at
mapper.select: SELECT rt.member_id, rt.token, rt.expires_at, m.email FROM refresh_token rt JOIN member m ON m.id = rt.member_id WHERE rt.token = #{refreshToken} AND rt.expires_at > NOW()
